card.title: 20th Sakyadhita International Conference on Buddhist Women
card.text: In 2027, the 20th Sakyadhita International Conference travels to Jakarta, bringing together Buddhist women from across the world's traditions for teachings, scholarship, and friendship.

mission.heading: Three pillars of our work
mission.intro: Sakyadhita is a grassroots network connecting Buddhist women worldwide. We promote research on Buddhist women's history and work for equal opportunity across all Buddhist traditions. Through local branches, free online resources, and our biannual conferences, we help empower the world's 300 million Buddhist women to work for peace and social justice.

pillars.title: Connect
pillars.text: A communications network linking some 300 million Buddhist women worldwide through branches, chapters, and online community.

pillars.title: Advance Equity
pillars.text: Working for gender equity in Buddhist education, training, institutional structures, and full ordination across traditions.

pillars.title: Convene
pillars.text: Hosting the world's largest gathering of Buddhist women — our biennial international conference, now in its 19th edition.

branches.heading: Find Sakyadhita near you
branches.text:
National branches and local chapters organize events, run translation projects, and bring Sakyadhita's mission to communities worldwide.
Click a pin to find your nearest branch.

hero.text: Since 1987, we have been bringing together laywomen, monastics, and scholars from across all Buddhist traditions to advance equality, education, and spiritual practice.
